arts.ttl: Arsenal could be player’s ‘next home’ as Gunners prepare offer – Exit will represent capital gain for club
arts.sum: Piotr Zielinski joined Inter Milan during the last summer transfer window but his situation is attracting the attention of Arsenal. He arrived at Inter on a free transfer after his contract expired with Napoli, but he’s had a frustrating season. He is currently out injured, with the Poland international only playing 22 Serie A games. The post Arsenal could be player’s ‘next home’ as Gunners prepare offer – Exit will represent capital gain for club appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 10 players could miss Everton vs Arsenal as Mikel Arteta faces selection dilemma after Gabriel blow
arts.sum: Both Arsenal and Everton are being forced to deal with several injury concerns going into their Premier League meeting this weekend. Mikel Arteta and Arsenal face a crucial January transfer window if they want to push Liverpool for the title and you can stay up to date with every breaking news story, opinion and more...

arts.ttl: Analysis: Returning Saka will inspire Arsenal
arts.sum: Producing 23 direct goal involvements in his 25 appearances in all competitions this season, he is as important to Arsenal as Mohamed Salah is to Liverpool. On Tuesday evening, just six minutes and 36 seconds after coming off the bench to one of the most rapturous ovations Emirates Stadium has ever seen or heard, Saka scored his sixth Premier League goal of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Magalhaes Arsenal injury update as star sends defiant message after season-ending blow
arts.sum: Gabriel Magalhaes has delivered a defiant message to Arsenal fans following confirmation of his season-ending hamstring injury. The news comes as a major blow to Mikel Arteta's side due to the fact they are preparing for a huge Champions League quarter-final tie against Real Madrid this month.

arts.ttl: Mbappé and Rüdiger fined but escape suspension and won’t miss Arsenal tie
arts.sum: Today, 23 days after that match and just four days before Madrid face Arsenal, UEFA has officially closed its investigation into the " indecent conduct" displayed by four Real Madrid players during the second leg of the Champions League Round of 16 against Atlético at the Metropolitano. The events under UEFA’s disciplinary scrutiny took place after the match concluded, when Rüdiger—who had just scored the decisive penalty—and the rest of the Real Madrid squad headed toward the north end of the Metropolitano to celebrate their victory with the away fans .

arts.ttl: Revealed: Four Real Madrid stars at risk of BANS for Arsenal Champions League showdown learn their fate
arts.sum: Mbappe was accused of touching his genitals in a derogatory manner, Vinicius Jr allegedly clashed with Atletico fans during and after the game, while Rudiger is said to have made a gesture.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Ready Shock Bid to Sign £200k-p/w Winger Alongside Nico Williams
arts.sum: Arsenal are eyeing a stunning move to sign Man Utd star Antony alongside Nico Williams this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make Alexander Isak transfer 'decision' as Newcastle United plan next move
arts.sum: The report claims that Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres is now the priority centre forward target for the Gunners going into the summer transfer window . Signing a new centre forward has dominated the Arsenal rumour mill since last summer, with the club opting not to go into the market for a new No.9 before the start of the season or during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Sporting's cut-price fee for Arsenal and Man United target Viktor Gyokeres as Portuguese club make surprise 'thank you' gesture
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres has been earmarked with a move away from Sporting Lisbon this summer, with Man United and Arsenal considered the frontrunners to win his signature.

arts.ttl: Premier League GW31 predictions: Manchester derby to finish all square, Arsenal to win spectacularly at Everton
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on Paddy Boyd - lead singer/guitarist of Northern Irish alternative rock quartet The Florentinas - for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 31 of the 2024-25 season.
